MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the trial date. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Re-Notice Of Motion To Copel Further Resopnses To Second Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents, Compliance With First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David R. Burtt, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Connexus Corporation
Daniel K. Slaughter, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Cyphermedia, Inc.

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: Plaintiff Connexus Corporation's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Second Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents, Compliance With First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents is denied. The requests overly broad. As to Request For Production Nos. 58, 59, 61, and 63, the requests are overly broad and invade financial privacy without good cause. The responses that have been made are adequate.

All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
